evidence.source_title: Why UK Is Imposing Sanctions on Founder of Ayandeh Bank - Kayhan Life
evidence.description: Babak Zanjani reportedly attended the funeral of Ali Ansari's father in June 2025, indicating a connection between the two sanctioned businessmen.

editorial_notes: Both are sanctioned businessmen who operated within IRGC-connected economic networks during the Ahmadinejad era.
